text:
1 = Impaired - sees larged print, but not regular print in newspapers/books; 2= Moderately Impaired - limited vision, not able to see newspaper headlines, but can identify objects; 3 = Highly Impaired - object identification in question, but eyes appear to follow objects; 4 = Severely Impaired - no vision or sees only light, colors, or shapes - eyes do not appear to follow objects; "-" = Unknown; -2 = Space.
154 D2A D2A_SIDE_VISN_PROB (D2A) Side Vision Problems CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: visual
